MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandon Tang of Century Centre telephone number 510-896-9411 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court comfirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST, L.L.C.'S Motion to Set Aside the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment in Event of Default in Payment Plan is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.
